triage.stack_shape_summary: product-doc source; host dependence engine_only; integration mode adapt.
triage.boilerplate_vs_product_boundary: Directive-owned form: Directive-owned Engine logic or operating-code asset such as a contract, schema, template, policy, or shared lib.. Excluded baggage: non-mission-relevant source detail, unadapted source terminology.
triage.fit_to_current_direction: Meta-usefulness: shared Engine analysis detected engine-improvement signals, so the value appears to improve how Directive Workspace discovers, judges, adapts, proves, or integrates future sources.
triage.reusability_across_surfaces: Value remains useful without a host runtime surface.
triage.operational_risk: Discovery only recorded the route and proof boundary; downstream execution remains out of scope and human review is still required.
triage.can_current_gates_validate_safely: partially - proof plan architecture_validation defines required evidence and gates, but human review still decides whether to advance.
triage.missing_evidence: adapted mechanism described, excluded baggage described, engine or product boundary improvement explained, improvement delta stays anchored to prior extraction, adaptation, and improvement stages
triage.next_action: Materialize the adapted mechanism as engine-owned product logic only after the staged proof boundary for "improve engine self-improvement quality" remains explicit through adaptation_complete.
triage.monitor_defer_trigger_conditions: If the route is rejected in human review, keep the source in Discovery instead of forcing downstream work.
triage.reentry_conditions: Respect rollback boundary: Keep the result at experiment status and do not integrate it into the engine until the staged proof boundary is clearer.
